items.title: Security Update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This update resolves 13 vulnerabilities, including eight critical ones, that could lead to arbitrary code execution, security feature bypass, and privilege escalation.

items.title: Arbitrary Code Execution via Improper Encoding/Escaping of Output in Webhooks
items.summary: A critical vulnerability (CVSS 10.0) in Adobe Commerce's webhooks component allows unauthenticated, zero-interaction arbitrary code execution due to improper output encoding.

items.title: Unrestricted File Upload leading to Privilege Escalation
items.summary: This critical vulnerability (CVSS 9.6) allows attackers to upload unrestricted files to the server, potentially leading to privilege escalation.

items.title: Amasty patches 25 Magento extensions, one critical
items.summary: Amasty issued a massive security release for 25 extensions, with one critical vulnerability that can lead to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Incorrect Authorization Vulnerability (Auth Bypass)
items.summary: This vulnerability allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to bypass security checks and gain unauthorized write access to Adobe Commerce.

items.title: Critical Security Update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could lead to security feature bypass, privilege escalation, arbitrary code execution, and arbitrary file system read.

items.title: Unrestricted File Upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce REST API
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical flaw in Magento's REST API that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store using a polyglot technique to bypass validation.
